---
title: "phase1"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-05-05"
---
```{r}
# install.packages("readxl")
# install.packages("ggplot2")
# install.packages("dplyr")
# install.packages("car")
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(car)
```

```{r}
# Set working directory if needed
# setwd("your/path/here")

# Read Excel file
temp <- read.csv("temp.csv")
ph <- read.csv("ph.csv")
temp_data <- temp[0:4]
ph_data <- ph[0:4]

# Ensure 'trial' and the treatment variables are factors for ANOVA
temp_data$Trial <- as.factor(temp_data$Trial)
temp_data$Temp  <- as.factor(temp_data$Temp)

ph_data$Trial <- as.factor(ph_data$Trial)
ph_data$pH    <- as.factor(ph_data$pH)

names(temp_data)[names(temp_data) == "Diameter..cm."] <- "Diameter"
names(ph_data)[names(ph_data) == "Diameter..cm."] <- "Diameter"

head(temp_data)
head(ph_data)
```

```{r}
# define a function to run this workflow for either dataset
analyze_growth <- function(data, treatment_col) {
  
  cat("\n--- ANALYZING:", treatment_col, "---\n")
  
  # A. Fit 2-Way ANOVA Model
  # formula: Diameter ~ Treatment + Trial + Treatment:Trial
  formula_anova <- as.formula(paste("Diameter ~", treatment_col, "* Trial"))
  anova_model <- lm(formula_anova, data = data)
  anova_results <- summary(aov(anova_model))
  print(anova_results)
  
  # B. Assumption Checks
  # 1. Residual vs Fitted (Constant Variance)
  plot(anova_model, which = 1, main = paste("Residuals vs Fitted:", treatment_col))
  
  # 2. QQ Plot (Normality)
  plot(anova_model, which = 2, main = paste("Normal Q-Q:", treatment_col))
  
  # 3. Formal Levene's Test for Homogeneity of Variance
  levene_test <- leveneTest(formula_anova, data = data)
  print(levene_test)
  
  # C. Conditional Linear Regression
  # Check if Trial or Interaction is significant (p < 0.05)
  trial_p_val <- anova_results[[1]][["Pr(>F)"]][2]
  inter_p_val <- anova_results[[1]][["Pr(>F)"]][3]
  
  # Convert treatment back to numeric for polynomial regression
  data[[treatment_col]] <- as.numeric(as.character(data[[treatment_col]]))
  
  if (trial_p_val > 0.05) {
    cat("\nTrial is NOT significant. Fitting basic quadratic model.\n")
    # Model: Y = b0 + b1*X + b2*X^2
    reg_formula <- as.formula(paste("Diameter ~", treatment_col, "+ I(", treatment_col, "^2)"))
  } else {
    cat("\nTrial IS significant. Fitting complex quadratic model with trial interaction.\n")
    # Model: Y = b0 + b1*X + b2*X^2 + b3*trial + b4*trial*X + b5*trial*X^2
    reg_formula <- as.formula(paste("Diameter ~ (", treatment_col, "+ I(", treatment_col, "^2)) * trial"))
  }
  
  final_model <- lm(reg_formula, data = data)
  
  # D. Model Selection & Evaluation
  cat("\n--- Final Model Summary ---\n")
  print(summary(final_model))
  
  cat("\n--- ANOVA Table for Regression ---\n")
  print(anova(final_model))
  
  return(final_model)
}
```

```{r}
temp_model_final <- analyze_growth(temp_data, "Temp")
```

```{r}
ph_model_final <- analyze_growth(ph_data, "pH")
```
